InstanceId.description: The ID of the EC2 instance to enable for SQL Server high availability standby detection.
InstanceId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the EC2 instance to enable for SQL Server high availability standby detection.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^i-[0-9a-f]{8,17}$  
Update requires: No interruption

SqlServerCredentials.description: The ARN of the AWS Secrets Manager secret containing SQL Server access credentials to the EC2 instance. If not specified, AWS Systems Manager agent will use default local user credentials.
SqlServerCredentials.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the AWS Secrets Manager secret containing SQL Server access credentials to the EC2 instance. If not specified, AWS Systems Manager agent will use default local user credentials.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^(?=.{20,2048}$)arn:aws[a-z-]*:secretsmanager:[a-z0-9-]+:\d{12}:secret:[a-zA-Z0-9/_+=.@-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

HaStatus.description: The SQL Server high availability status of the EC2 instance.
HaStatus.markdownDescription:
The SQL Server high availability status of the EC2 instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: processing | active | standby | invalid  
Update requires: No interruption

SqlServerLicenseUsage.description: The SQL Server license type of the EC2 instance.
SqlServerLicenseUsage.markdownDescription:
The SQL Server license type of the EC2 instance.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: full | waived  
Update requires: No interruption

LastUpdatedTime.description: The timestamp when the EC2 instance's SQL Server high availability status was last updated.
LastUpdatedTime.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the EC2 instance's SQL Server high availability status was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
